# init(url:displayName:editingMode:)

**Initializer**

Create a preview item from a URL and, optionally, a displayName and editingMode.

## Declaration

```swift
init(url: URL, displayName: String? = nil, editingMode: EditingMode = .updateContents)
```
title: init(url:displayName:editingMode:)
